title: The Warrior's Husband
writer: Walter Lang, Sonya Levien, Ralph Spence
actors: Elissa Landi, David Manners, Ernest Truex
plot: In Pontus, the land of the Amazons, gender roles and natures are completely reversed: men stay at home and take care of the children and women are the strong sex, thanks to the sacred girdle of the Roman goddess Diana. It is in th...
